name: My Phoenix firm used AI for referral—does AZ have special rules?
description: AZ requires tech competence like NY; disclose AI use.[8]

mainEntity.name: My Phoenix firm used AI for referral—does AZ have special rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: AZ requires tech competence like NY; disclose AI use.[8]
acceptedAnswer.description: AZ follows ABA Model Rule 1.1 on tech competence; no AI-specific ban, but disclosure urged. Similar to NY's evolving CPLR amendments for AI in litigation.[8] Factors: state bar opinions on gen AI, proof of harm from referral. Check AZ bar for guidance. Nationwide tools apply uniformly.[5] File complaint if negligent.
